articles.title: USPS backs out of planned Allston post office
articles.description:
The neighborhood has been without a post office since 2019, when structural issues forced the closure of the Harvard Avenue location.

The post USPS backs out of planned Allston post office appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Update: USPS backs out of planned Allston post office

Details:

The neighborhood has been without a post office
